If you notice an issue, please consider making an edit, starting a discussion on the article's talk page, or reaching out via the [Arknights Terra Wiki Discord](https://discord.gg/2eXU4KHYpB). # Ave Mujica From Arknights Terra Wiki [Jump to navigation](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Ave_Mujica#mw-head) [Jump to search](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Ave_Mujica#searchInput) Ave Mujica Origin _[BanG Dream!](https://bandori.miraheze.org/wiki/BanG_Dream!)_ Etymology Latin for "Hail (the) Music", which is a nod to ["Ave Maria" by Franz Schubert](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ave_Maria_(Schubert) "wikipedia:Ave Maria (Schubert)") In Other Languages Japanese アヴェムジカ Korean 아벤지카 General Information Type [Gothic metal](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Gothic_metal "wikipedia:Gothic metal") band Leader [Togawa Sakiko "Oblivionis"](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Togawa_Sakiko "Togawa Sakiko") Races [Earthling](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Earthling "Earthling") Status Active | | | | | --- | --- | --- | | “ | _Welcome... to the world of Ave Mujica._ | ” | **Ave Mujica** is a Japanese all-girl [Gothic metal](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Gothic_rock "wikipedia:Gothic rock") band from [Earth](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Earth "wikipedia:Earth") formed by five highschoolers and led by [Togawa Sakiko aka. "Oblivionis"](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Togawa_Sakiko "Togawa Sakiko") on-stage, who find themselves in [Terra](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Terra "Terra"). ## Contents - [1Background](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Ave_Mujica#Background) - [2Members](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Ave_Mujica#Members) - [3Discography](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Ave_Mujica#Discography) - [4Interactions](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Ave_Mujica#Interactions) - [5Trivia](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Ave_Mujica#Trivia) - [6Notes](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Ave_Mujica#Notes) - [7Navigation](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Ave_Mujica#Navigation) ## Background\[ [edit](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Ave_Mujica?action=edit§ion=1 "Edit section: Background")\] _Main article: [Ave Mujica (BanG Dream! Wiki)](https://bandori.miraheze.org/wiki/Ave_Mujica)_ Ave Mujica was formed by Sakiko, the daughter of the Togawa Group, who was formerly the leader and keyboardist of the band [CRYCHIC](https://bandori.miraheze.org/wiki/CRYCHIC) during her middle school period, together with her friends [Wakaba Mutsumi](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Wakaba_Mutsumi "Wakaba Mutsumi"), [Takamatsu Tomori](https://bandori.miraheze.org/wiki/Takamatsu_Tomori), [Nagasaki Soyo](https://bandori.miraheze.org/wiki/Nagasaki_Soyo), and [Shiina Taki](https://bandori.miraheze.org/wiki/Shiina_Taki). Due to various personal factors, both Sakiko and Mutsumi formally departed from the band, while the other three members reorganized into another band called [MyGO!!!!!](https://bandori.miraheze.org/wiki/MyGO!!!!!). In response to the formation of MyGO!!!!! by Tomori, Sakiko decided to create Ave Mujica. While incorporating her childhood friend Mutsumi into the new band, she also invited three new members who had been active in the entertainment and social media fields: [Misumi Uika](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Misumi_Uika "Misumi Uika"), the vocalist from the already famous idol unit [sumimi](https://bandori.miraheze.org/wiki/Sumimi), [Yūtenji Nyamu](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Y%C5%ABtenji_Nyamu "Yūtenji Nyamu"), the social media influencer, and [Yahata Umiri](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Yahata_Umiri "Yahata Umiri"), for her professional-level freelancing as a bassist. Because of their different backgrounds and experiences, members of Ave Mujica learned to cooperate with each others while tolerating their differences, even though some of them have their own personal circumstances. The visual theme of Ave Mujica centers on [Gothic elements](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Goth_subculture "wikipedia:Goth subculture") and [dark culture](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dark_culture "wikipedia:Dark culture"). During their live performances, each member refers to themselves using their stage names, which are taken from names of different [lunar maria](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lunar_mare "wikipedia:Lunar mare"). They wear masquerade masks with woven patterns of flowers to disguise themselves from the audience, whom they call "accomplices". During performances, they usually refer to themselves as dolls, symbolizing the ways in which each member is controlled by outside expectations. ## Members\[ [edit](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Ave_Mujica?action=edit§ion=2 "Edit section: Members")\] | Character | Information | Status | | --- | --- | --- | | [![Togawa Sakiko](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/Togawa_Sakiko_icon.png/60px-Togawa_Sakiko_icon.png?2869d1)](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Togawa_Sakiko)
[Togawa Sakiko](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Togawa_Sakiko) | Leader, composer, and keyboardist of Ave Mujica, who performs under the stage name " **Oblivionis**"[\[note 1\]](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Ave_Mujica#cite_note-1). The daughter of the Togawa Group and former founder of CRYCHIC prior its disbandment. | Alive | | [![Misumi Uika](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/Misumi_Uika_icon.png/60px-Misumi_Uika_icon.png?961249)](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Misumi_Uika)
[Misumi Uika](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Misumi_Uika) | Vocalist, lead guitarist, and lyricist of Ave Mujica, who performs under the stage name " **Doloris**"[\[note 2\]](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Ave_Mujica#cite_note-2). Famous for being the vocalist/guitarist of the idol duo sumimi before being invited to join the band by her childhood friend Sakiko, who she cares for deeply. Her real name is **Misumi Hatsune**, the illegitimate daughter of [Togawa Sadaharu](https://bandori.miraheze.org/wiki/Togawa_Sadaharu). | Alive | | [![Wakaba Mutsumi](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/Wakaba_Mutsumi_icon.png/60px-Wakaba_Mutsumi_icon.png?4a3478)](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Wakaba_Mutsumi)
[Wakaba Mutsumi](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Wakaba_Mutsumi) | Rhythm guitarist of Ave Mujica, who performs under the stage name " **Mortis**"[\[note 3\]](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Ave_Mujica#cite_note-3). Former CRYCHIC member, daughter of a celebrity couple and Sakiko's childhood friend. She has [dissociative identity disorder](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dissociative_identity_disorder "wikipedia:Dissociative identity disorder"). | Alive | | [![Yahata Umiri](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/Yahata_Umiri_icon.png/60px-Yahata_Umiri_icon.png?2f807e)](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Yahata_Umiri)
[Yahata Umiri](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Yahata_Umiri) | Bassist of Ave Mujica, who performs under the stage name " **Timoris**"[\[note 4\]](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Ave_Mujica#cite_note-4). Formerly a freelancer working as a support bassist for roughly thirty bands, before being invited to join Ave Mujica due to her prowess and management abilities. | Alive | | [![Yūtenji Nyamu](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/Y%C5%ABtenji_Nyamu_icon.png/60px-Y%C5%ABtenji_Nyamu_icon.png?a4e1c6)](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Y%C5%ABtenji_Nyamu)
[Yūtenji Nyamu](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Y%C5%ABtenji_Nyamu) | Drummer of Ave Mujica, who performs under the stage name " **Amoris**"[\[note 5\]](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Ave_Mujica#cite_note-5). A social media influencer from [Kumamoto](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kumamoto_Prefecture "wikipedia:Kumamoto Prefecture") who aspired to make it big, and accepted Sakiko's offer to join the band to get her foot in the entertainment industry. | Alive | ## Discography\[ [edit](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Ave_Mujica?action=edit§ion=3 "Edit section: Discography")\] - " [Kuro no Birthday](https://bandori.miraheze.org/wiki/Kuro_no_Birthday)": Used in the official trailer of [Somniloquium Serenum](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Somniloquium_Serenum "Somniloquium Serenum"). - " [Georgette Me, Georgette You](https://bandori.miraheze.org/wiki/Georgette_Me,_Georgette_You)": An instrumental piano/violin arrangement is used as the BGM of the ["Spotlight" Home Screen background](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Home_Screen/Background#Spotlight "Home Screen/Background"). - " [KiLLKiSS](https://bandori.miraheze.org/wiki/KiLLKiSS)": Instrumental version used during [Fever](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Fever "Fever"), with the vocal version overriding it if all five Ave Mujica members are on the map. [A Global-exclusive official video](https://youtube.com/watch?v=WGF7rdNicQw) also features a cover of "KiLLKiSS" by [Rhodes Island](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Rhodes_Island "Rhodes Island") Operators. - " [Imprisoned XII](https://bandori.miraheze.org/wiki/Imprisoned_XII)": Sung by Uika Misumi in [SS-4](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/SS-4/Story "SS-4/Story"). - " [in your blue eyes](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/In_Your_Blue_Eyes "In Your Blue Eyes")": Original composition for _[Arknights](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Arknights "Arknights")_, used in the [animated cutscene](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/File:SS-8_cutscene.webm "File:SS-8 cutscene.webm") on [SS-8](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/SS-8/Story "SS-8/Story") and the Vigil mode of [The Hall](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Somniloquium_Serenum#Dream_Puzzle_Pieces "Somniloquium Serenum"), where the full version is heard. ## Interactions\[ [edit](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Ave_Mujica?action=edit§ion=4 "Edit section: Interactions")\] | Operator | Subject | Interaction | | --- | --- | --- | | [![Togawa Sakiko](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/Togawa_Sakiko_icon.png/60px-Togawa_Sakiko_icon.png?2869d1)](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Togawa_Sakiko) | Notes of Ode | For every note on the field, all Ave Mujica members ignore a certain amount of DEF and RES, stacking up to 10 times (12 with a Stage 2+ LOR-Y Module):
- Elite 1: 2.5% DEF, 1.5% RES
- Elite 2: 3% DEF, 2% RES
- LOR-Y Stage 2: 4% DEF, 2% RES
- LOR-Y Stage 3: 5% DEF, 2.5% RES | | Do Not Fear Forgetting | If an Ave Mujica member's attack range overlaps with Sakiko's, their range will be treated as an extension of Sakiko's own. | | ![Skill-Togawa3.png](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/Skill-Togawa3.png/48px-Skill-Togawa3.png?e96582)
Crescent Moon Echoes | While [Fever](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Fever "Fever") is active, Ave Mujica members that take fatal damage will not retreat until Crescent Moon Echoes ends, after which they will be immediately retreated. | | [![Misumi Uika](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/Misumi_Uika_icon.png/60px-Misumi_Uika_icon.png?961249)](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Misumi_Uika) | Do Not Fear Sorrow | Increases Fever when restoring HP to an Ave Mujica member; at Elite 1, Ave Mujica members in attack range deal a percentage of Uika's ATK as additional Arts damage on hit:
- Base: +2 Fever
- Elite 1: +3 Fever, 15% ATK
- Elite 2: +5 Fever, 30% ATK | | [![Wakaba Mutsumi](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/Wakaba_Mutsumi_icon.png/60px-Wakaba_Mutsumi_icon.png?4a3478)](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Wakaba_Mutsumi) | Another "Her" | When Ave Mujica members attack, chance to shorten the duration of Mutsumi's substitute by 1 second:
- Elite 1: 10%
- Elite 2: 20% | | Do Not Fear Death | Ave Mujica members gain increased Max. HP while deployed:
- Elite 1: 5%
- Elite 2: 10% | | [![Yahata Umiri](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/Yahata_Umiri_icon.png/60px-Yahata_Umiri_icon.png?2f807e)](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Yahata_Umiri) | Do Not Fear Being Afraid | Ave Mujica members deal additional damage to enemies with [Slow](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Slow "Slow") or [Fear](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Fear "Fear"):
- Base: 3%
- Elite 2: 10%
- Potential 5: +5% | | [![Yūtenji Nyamu](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/Y%C5%ABtenji_Nyamu_icon.png/60px-Y%C5%ABtenji_Nyamu_icon.png?a4e1c6)](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Y%C5%ABtenji_Nyamu) | Do Not Fear Love | Ave Mujica members gain increased ATK while deployed:
- Elite 1: 3%
- Elite 2: 8%
- Potential 5: +1% | ## Trivia\[ [edit](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Ave_Mujica?action=edit§ion=5 "Edit section: Trivia")\] - Like [Laios's Party](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Laios%27s_Party "Laios's Party"), Ave Mujica reuses the Rhodes Island logo as their logo in-game despite already having their own logo. - Unlike other [Operators](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Operator "Operator"), in their default _chibi_ in-game models, the Ave Mujica members wear costumes in their respective Elite 2 artworks. - The Ave Mujica members modules missions references their own characters: - Nyamu's module mission is to defeat a [Remnant Orchestra Drummer](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Remnant_Orchestra_Drummer "Remnant Orchestra Drummer"), which is her actual position in the band. Likewise, Umiri's mission is to defeat [Rogue Mercenary Bass](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Rogue_Mercenary_Bass "Rogue Mercenary Bass"). - Sakiko's module mission stage is called [What to Be Forgotten](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/IS-7 "IS-7"), referring to her stage name Oblivionis (Latin for Forgotten). - Uika's module mission stage is called [Valse "Mask"](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/ZT-6 "ZT-6"), referring to her actual story in the series. - Mutsumi's module stage mission is called ["We"](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/13-16 "13-16") which also refers to her story in the series. - Every member of Ave Mujica has at least one way to expand their attack range. - Nyamu and Mutsumi can use their second skill to expand their range by 7 tiles. - Umiri and Sakiko can expand their range via their talents. - Uika is the only member to use her 1st skill to expand her attack range. - Additionally, Sakiko can also use her 3rd skill to expand her attack range. - In the PV for Rhodes Island Epic, there's a folder in the background titled "mujica\_Live", which directly references the band. ## Notes\[ [edit](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Ave_Mujica?action=edit§ion=6 "Edit section: Notes")\] 1. [↑](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Ave_Mujica#cite_ref-1 "Jump up")From [Lacus Oblivionis](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lacus_Oblivionis "wikipedia:Lacus Oblivionis"), whose name is Latin for "Lake of Forgetfulness" 2. [↑](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Ave_Mujica#cite_ref-2 "Jump up")From [Lacus Doloris](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lacus_Doloris "wikipedia:Lacus Doloris"), whose name is Latin for "Lake of Sorrow" 3. [↑](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Ave_Mujica#cite_ref-3 "Jump up")From [Lacus Mortis](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lacus_Mortis "wikipedia:Lacus Mortis"), whose name is Latin for "Lake of Death" 4. [↑](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Ave_Mujica#cite_ref-4 "Jump up")From [Lacus Timoris](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lacus_Timoris "wikipedia:Lacus Timoris"), whose name is Latin for "Lake of Fear" 5. [↑](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Ave_Mujica#cite_ref-5 "Jump up")From [Sinus Amoris](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sinus_Amoris "wikipedia:Sinus Amoris"), whose name is Latin for "Bay of Love" ## Navigation Expand[View or edit this template](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Template:Factions "Template:Factions") Factions Nation-states - metadata.ogDescription: Ave Mujica is a Japanese all-girl Gothic metal band from Earth formed by five highschoolers and led by Togawa Sakiko aka. "Oblivionis" on-stage, who find themselves in Terra.
